content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be dramatically improved by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision data while eliminating its common blind spot of narrow, single-perspective feedback loops. This hybrid framework leverages inconsistent internal perspectives to catch flaws the model would miss when only refining from its original starting output frame.
